apprunner.service.codeconfiguration.Code.Docs: The basic configuration for building and running the App Runner service. Use it to quickly launch an App Runner service without providing a `apprunner.yaml` file in the source code repository (or ignoring the file if it exists).

apprunner.service.codeconfiguration.Conf.Docs: The source of the App Runner configuration. Values are interpreted as follows:  +  `REPOSITORY` – App Runner reads configuration values from the `apprunner.yaml` file in the source code repository and ignores `CodeConfigurationValues`.+  `API` – App Runner uses configuration values provided in `CodeConfigurationValues` and ignores the `apprunner.yaml` file in the source code repository.
